title: Ethereum Foundation Spinout EthSystems Targets Banks With Blockchain Privacy Technology
summary: The Ethereum Foundation has spun out a new company, EthSystems, focused on bringing blockchain privacy solutions to traditional banks. This move comes as part of a significant restructuring within the foundation.
body:
The Ethereum Foundation, a key organization behind the Ethereum blockchain, has spun out a new company called EthSystems. This new venture is specifically targeting banks and financial institutions, offering them privacy-focused blockchain technology. The move is part of a broader organizational shakeup at the foundation, one of the most significant in recent years.

EthSystems aims to provide financial institutions with tools that enable private transactions on the blockchain. This is particularly important for banks, which often require confidentiality for their operations. The technology could help banks leverage blockchain's benefits, such as transparency and security, without compromising on privacy.

For everyday people, this development could mean more banks adopting blockchain technology in the future. As banks integrate these privacy solutions, customers might see faster, more secure, and private financial services. However, it's important to note that widespread adoption will depend on how quickly and effectively EthSystems can convince banks to adopt its technology.

Those interested in the intersection of traditional finance and blockchain should keep an eye on EthSystems' progress. If successful, this could pave the way for more banks to explore and implement blockchain solutions, potentially leading to a more integrated financial ecosystem. Watch for announcements from EthSystems and the Ethereum Foundation for updates on their collaboration and the rollout of their privacy technology.
twitterThread: Banks may soon get privacy-focused blockchain tech, thanks to Ethereum Foundation's new spinout, EthSystems.
EthSystems is developing tools to allow banks to use blockchain while keeping transactions private. This could speed up adoption in traditional finance.

If EthSystems succeeds, we might see more banks using blockchain. Watch for updates from the Ethereum Foundation → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-07-14-ethereum-foundation-spinout-ethsystems-aims-to-bring-privacy-tech-to-banks
standaloneTweet: Banks could soon use blockchain tech without sacrificing privacy, thanks to Ethereum Foundation's new spinout, EthSystems.
